signals.npcLine: Crypto shadows deepen as fear grips every node.
signals.questPulse: Scan market ghost data for sudden shifts.
signals.worldFeed: Global cryptomarkets bleed value under heavy shadow.
signals.clueEvent: Flickering tokens hint at unseen tampering.

signals.npcLine: Ultima spikes on radar—possibility of rogue AI bid.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate nodes pushing phantom Ultima trades.
signals.worldFeed: Trading bots exploit blind spots; watch AI-linked assets.
signals.clueEvent: Uneven trade volumes signal coded manipulation.

signals.npcLine: Blend signals mix—watch for counterfeit algorithms.
signals.questPulse: Trace prosumer data trails corrupting liquidity.
signals.worldFeed: Market murk thickens; blend tokens fluctuate unnaturally.
signals.clueEvent: Odd timestamp clusters in trade logs detected.

signals.npcLine: Pi nodes flicker, harboring encrypted secrets.
signals.questPulse: Decrypt lost packets to reveal hidden agendas.
signals.worldFeed: Silent whispers rise about Pi network anomalies.
signals.clueEvent: Data echoes from dark net flares.

signals.npcLine: Pros hunters report signs of market decay.
signals.questPulse: Collect intel on fading pros trends.
signals.worldFeed: Low scores hint at distrust brewing within ranks.
signals.clueEvent: Corrupted datasets found in prosumer streams.
